title: jasione humilis subsp. tomentosa
intro: Jasione humilis subsp. tomentosa, also known as tomentose bellflower, is a subspecies of the Jasione humilis plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of tomentose bellflower include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in tincture or salve form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
